questions.question: Ek entrepreneur kaun hota hai?

options.A: Ek employee jo company ke rules follow karta hai.
options.B: Ek vyakti jo naye business ideas shuru karta hai aur risk leta hai.
options.C: Ek investor jo sirf paise lagata hai.
options.D: Ek manager jo existing operations ko handle karta hai.

questions.explanation: Entrepreneur woh vyakti hota hai jo naye business ideas ko pehchaanta hai, unhe shuru karta hai, aur usse jude risks ko manage karta hai.

questions.question: Entrepreneurship ka mukhya uddeshya kya hai?

options.B: Employment generate karna.

questions.explanation: Entrepreneurship ka mukhya uddeshya sirf profit kamana nahi hota, balki innovation lana, value create karna aur employment generate karna bhi hai.

questions.question: Intrapreneurship kya hai?

options.A: Ek business jo do entrepreneurs milkar chalate hain.
options.B: Bade business ke andar entrepreneurship ki bhavna se naye ideas develop karna.
options.C: Ek business jo international market mein operate karta hai.
options.D: Ek business jo social cause ke liye kaam karta hai.

questions.explanation: Intrapreneurship mein ek bade sangathan ke andar employees entrepreneur ki tarah sochkar naye products ya services develop karte hain.

questions.question: Ek successful entrepreneur ki sabse important quality kya hai?

options.B: Risk-taking ability.

questions.explanation: Ek successful entrepreneur mein risk lene ki kshamta honi chahiye, kyunki har naye business mein uncertainty aur challenges hote hain.

questions.question: Innovation ka entrepreneurship mein kya role hai?

options.A: Ye sirf bade businesses ke liye zaroori hai.
options.B: Naye products, services ya processes banane mein madad karta hai.

questions.explanation: Innovation entrepreneurship ka core hai. Yeh naye products, services, ya processes develop karne mein madad karta hai jo market mein value add karte hain.

questions.question: Micro-enterprise kaun sa business hota hai?

options.A: Jisme investment 10 crore se zyada ho.
options.B: Jisme investment 1 crore tak ho aur turnover 5 crore tak ho.

questions.explanation: Micro-enterprise woh business hota hai jisme investment 1 crore tak aur turnover 5 crore tak hota hai (as per MSME classification).

questions.question: Entrepreneurship ke liye sabse pehla kadam kya hai?

options.B: Business idea identify karna.

questions.explanation: Kisi bhi business ko shuru karne se pehle, ek viable business idea ko pehchanna sabse pehla aur sabse mahatvapurna kadam hai.

questions.question: Social entrepreneurship kya focus karta hai?

options.B: Social problems ko solve karna aur profit bhi kamana.

questions.explanation: Social entrepreneurship ka uddeshya samajik samasyao ko hal karna hai, jabki financial sustainability ke liye profit bhi kamaya jata hai.

questions.question: Entrepreneurship ek career option ke roop mein kya advantages deta hai?

options.B: Higher job security.

questions.explanation: Entrepreneurship mein vyakti ko apne kaam par control aur apni ichha anusar kaam karne ki azadi milti hai, jo self-fulfillment deta hai.

questions.question: Ek entrepreneur ko 'change agent' kyun kaha jata hai?

options.A: Kyunki woh sirf political changes lata hai.
options.B: Kyunki woh market mein naye products aur services introduce karke badlav lata hai.
options.C: Kyunki woh employees ko change karta hai.
options.D: Kyunki woh apne business ka location change karta rehta hai.

questions.explanation: Entrepreneurs naye ideas aur innovations ke through market mein badlav late hain, isliye unhe 'change agent' kaha jata hai.

questions.question: Family business mein entrepreneurship ka kya role hai?

options.A: Ye sirf existing business ko maintain karta hai.
options.B: Ye naye products/services, markets aur processes introduce karke business ko grow karta hai.
options.C: Ye sirf family members ko employment deta hai.
options.D: Ye family business ke bahar innovation ko rokta hai.

questions.explanation: Family business mein entrepreneurship naye ideas aur growth strategies lakar business ko agle level par le jane mein madad karti hai.

questions.question: Entrepreneurship ecosystem mein kya shamil hota hai?

options.B: Government, educational institutions, funding agencies aur support organizations.

questions.explanation: Entrepreneurship ecosystem mein vibhinn stakeholders jaise government, educational institutions, investors, incubators, aadi shamil hote hain jo entrepreneurs ko support karte hain.

questions.question: MSME ka full form kya hai?

options.B: Micro Small and Medium Enterprises

questions.explanation: MSME ka full form Micro Small and Medium Enterprises hai, jo India mein chhote aur madhyam udyogon ko classify karta hai.

questions.question: Ek entrepreneur ko apne business ke liye 'vision' kyun chahiye?

options.A: Sirf investors ko impress karne ke liye.
options.B: Future ke liye ek clear goal aur direction set karne ke liye.
options.C: Apne competitors ko copy karne ke liye.
options.D: Daily tasks ko manage karne ke liye.

questions.explanation: Vision ek entrepreneur ko apne business ke liye ek long-term goal aur direction provide karta hai, jisse woh sahi raste par chal sake.

questions.question: Entrepreneurship mein 'Failure' ko kaise dekha jana chahiye?

options.A: Business ko turant band kar dena chahiye.
options.B: Ek learning experience ke roop mein.
options.D: Kabhi bhi dobara try nahi karna chahiye.

questions.explanation: Entrepreneurship mein failure ko ek learning experience ke roop mein dekhna chahiye, jisse mistakes se seekhkar aage badha ja sake.

questions.question: Business idea generate karne ka ek effective tareeka kya hai?

options.A: Sirf existing businesses ko copy karna.
options.B: Brainstorming aur problem-solving.
options.C: Kisi aur ke idea ka intezar karna.

questions.explanation: Brainstorming aur real-world problems ko identify karke unke solutions dhundhna naye business ideas generate karne ka ek effective tareeka hai.

questions.question: Market research kyun zaroori hai ek naye business idea ke liye?

options.A: Sirf competitors ki jaankari ke liye.
options.B: Customers ki needs, preferences aur market potential ko samajhne ke liye.
options.C: Apne product ki price decide karne ke liye.
options.D: Legal compliances check karne ke liye.

questions.explanation: Market research customers ki zarooraton aur market ke potential ko samajhne mein madad karta hai, jisse ek viable business idea banaya ja sake.

questions.question: SWOT analysis mein 'S' kya represent karta hai?

options.B: Strengths

questions.explanation: SWOT analysis mein 'S' Strengths ko represent karta hai, jo ek business ke internal positive attributes hote hain.

questions.question: Customer Segmentation kya hai?

options.A: Customers ko alag-alag groups mein divide karna unki similar characteristics ke basis par.
options.B: Customers ko sirf unki income ke basis par classify karna.
options.C: Customers ko product ke types ke basis par divide karna.
options.D: Customers ko geographical location ke basis par divide karna.

questions.explanation: Customer segmentation mein customers ko unki common characteristics (jaise age, income, behavior) ke basis par groups mein divide kiya jata hai, jisse targeted marketing ki ja sake.

questions.question: Value Proposition kya hota hai?

options.B: Woh unique benefits jo ek product ya service customer ko provide karta hai.

questions.explanation: Value Proposition woh unique benefits aur value hai jo ek business apne customers ko offer karta hai, jisse woh competitors se alag dikhta hai.

questions.question: Primary market research ka ek example kya hai?

options.B: Competitors ki websites check karna.

questions.explanation: Primary market research mein data direct sources se collect kiya jata hai, jaise customer surveys, interviews, focus groups.

questions.question: Niche market kya hai?

options.A: Ek bada market jisme bahut competition ho.
options.B: Ek specific aur chhota segment of a larger market with unique needs.
options.D: Ek market jo sirf online operate karta ho.

questions.explanation: Niche market ek bade market ka ek chhota, specific segment hota hai jiske customers ki kuch khaas zarooratein hoti hain jinhe general market fulfill nahi kar pata.

questions.question: Competitive Analysis kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Sirf competitors ko copy karne ke liye.
options.B: Competitors ki strengths, weaknesses aur strategies ko samajhne ke liye.
options.C: Apne product ki quality ignore karne ke liye.
options.D: Market se bahar nikalne ke liye.

questions.explanation: Competitive analysis se aap apne competitors ko behtar samajh sakte hain aur unse alag hone ke liye apni strategies develop kar sakte hain.

questions.question: USP ka full form kya hai?

options.B: Universal Service Provider

questions.explanation: USP ka full form Unique Selling Proposition ya Unique Sales Point hota hai, jo aapke product/service ko competitors se alag banata hai.

questions.question: Problem-solving approach se business ideas kaise generate hote hain?

options.B: Logo ki daily life mein aane wali problems ko identify karke unke solutions offer karna.
options.D: Randomly koi bhi product choose karna.

questions.explanation: Aksar sabse successful business ideas logo ki real-life problems ko solve karne se aate hain. Problems ko pehchano aur solution provide karo.

questions.question: Brainstorming session mein kya avoid karna chahiye?

options.A: Ideas ko judge karna ya criticize karna.
options.B: Jyada se jyada ideas generate karna.

questions.explanation: Brainstorming ka main aim hai jyada se jyada ideas generate karna. Is stage par ideas ko judge ya criticize nahi karna chahiye.

questions.question: Feasibility study kya evaluate karti hai?

options.B: Ek business idea kitna practical aur viable hai.

questions.explanation: Feasibility study ek business idea ki practical applicability aur financial viability ko evaluate karti hai, jisse yeh pata chal sake ki business chalega ya nahi.

questions.question: Target market define karna kyun important hai?

options.A: Taki marketing efforts ko concentrate kiya ja sake aur resources waste na ho.
options.B: Taki product ki cost kam ho sake.
options.C: Taki competitors ko confuse kiya ja sake.
options.D: Taki government se subsidy mil sake.

questions.explanation: Target market define karne se aap apne marketing efforts ko sahi audience par focus kar sakte hain, jisse aapke resources effectively use honge.

questions.question: Pestle analysis mein 'P' kya refer karta hai?

options.B: Political

questions.explanation: Pestle analysis mein 'P' Political factors ko refer karta hai, jo ek business ke external environment ko analyze karne mein madad karta hai.

questions.question: Blue Ocean Strategy kya hai?

options.A: Existing market mein competitors se ladna.
options.B: Naye market space create karna jahan competition na ho.

questions.explanation: Blue Ocean Strategy ka matlab hai naye, uncontested market spaces (blue oceans) create karna, jahan competition irrelevant ho jata hai.

questions.question: Minimum Viable Product (MVP) kya hota hai?

options.A: Ek product jisme saari possible features ho.
options.B: Ek product jisme sirf core features ho, jisse early customers se feedback mil sake.
options.C: Ek product jo sirf testing ke liye banaya gaya ho.
options.D: Ek product jo market mein launch hone ke liye ready ho.

questions.explanation: MVP ek product ka sabse basic version hota hai jisme sirf core features hote hain, jisse use market mein jaldi launch karke customer feedback liya ja sake.

questions.question: Idea validation mein customer interviews ka kya role hai?

options.A: Customers ko product kharidne ke liye convince karna.
options.B: Customers ki real needs aur pain points ko samajhna.
options.D: Competitors ke baare mein jaankari ikattha karna.

questions.explanation: Customer interviews se aap apne target audience ki zarooraton aur problems ko directly samajh sakte hain, jo idea validation ke liye crucial hai.

questions.question: Secondary market research ka ek example kya hai?

options.B: Industry reports aur government statistics.

questions.explanation: Secondary market research mein existing data ka use kiya jata hai jo pehle se collect kiya ja chuka hai, jaise industry reports, government statistics, articles.

questions.question: Trend spotting entrepreneurship mein kyun valuable hai?

options.B: Future market opportunities aur customer demands ko predict karne ke liye.
options.C: Past market data analyze karne ke liye.
options.D: Competitors ki strategies copy karne ke liye.

questions.explanation: Trend spotting se entrepreneurs aane wale trends ko pehchan sakte hain, jisse woh naye products ya services develop kar sakte hain jo future ki demands ko pura kare.

questions.question: Prototype banane ka mukhya uddeshya kya hai?

options.A: Product ko mass production ke liye ready karna.
options.B: Idea ko physical form mein test karna aur feedback lena.

questions.explanation: Prototype ek product ka working model hota hai jiska uddeshya idea ko test karna, usme sudhar karna aur early feedback lena hota hai.

questions.question: Business Plan ka mukhya uddeshya kya hai?

options.B: Business ke goals, strategies aur financial projections ko detail mein outline karna.

questions.explanation: Business plan ek blueprint hota hai jo business ke uddeshyon, strategies aur financial details ko describe karta hai, aur investors ko bhi attract karta hai.

questions.question: Executive Summary business plan ka kaun sa section hai?

options.B: Sabse pehla section jo poore business plan ka overview deta hai.

questions.explanation: Executive Summary business plan ka pehla section hota hai jo poore plan ka brief overview deta hai, aur readers ko aage padhne ke liye motivate karta hai.

questions.question: Proprietorship firm shuru karne ka kya advantage hai?

options.B: Minimum legal formalities aur easy to set up.

questions.explanation: Proprietorship mein ek hi vyakti business ka owner hota hai, aur isme legal formalities sabse kam hoti hain, jisse ise shuru karna aasan hota hai.

questions.question: Partnership firm mein partners ki liability kaisi hoti hai?

options.B: Unlimited liability.

questions.explanation: Partnership firm mein partners ki liability aam taur par unlimited hoti hai, matlab unki personal assets bhi business ke karz ke liye use ho sakti hain.

questions.question: Company registration ke liye kis act ke तहत register karna hota hai?

options.B: Companies Act, 2013

questions.explanation: Companies Act, 2013 India mein companies ke incorporation, regulation aur winding up se related laws ko govern karta hai.

questions.question: GST registration kab mandatory hota hai?

options.A: Jab turnover 10 lakh se kam ho.
options.B: Jab business inter-state supply karta ho ya turnover ek certain limit cross kar jaye.
options.C: Sirf service sector ke businesses ke liye.

questions.explanation: GST registration tab mandatory ho jata hai jab business inter-state supply karta ho ya uska annual turnover ek prescribed limit (currently ₹20 lakh or ₹40 lakh in some states) ko cross kar jaye.

questions.question: Business plan mein financial projections ka kya importance hai?

options.A: Sirf past performance dikhane ke liye.
options.B: Business ki potential profitability aur cash flow ko estimate karne ke liye.
options.C: Sirf expenses list karne ke liye.
options.D: Competitors ki financial details analyze karne ke liye.

questions.explanation: Financial projections business ki future profitability, expenses aur cash flow ka estimate dete hain, jo investors aur lenders ke liye crucial hota hai.

questions.question: Intellectual Property (IP) ka ek example kya hai?

options.B: Machinery.

questions.explanation: Intellectual Property mein creations of the mind shamil hote hain, jaise inventions (patents), literary aur artistic works (copyrights), designs, aur symbols, names aur images jo commercial use hote hain (trademarks).

questions.question: Udyam Registration kis liye hota hai?

options.B: MSME (Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises) ke registration ke liye.

questions.explanation: Udyam Registration MSME Ministry dwara shuru kiya gaya ek online system hai jiske through Micro, Small aur Medium Enterprises register hote hain.

questions.question: Business plan mein 'Management Team' section mein kya shamil hota hai?

options.B: Company ke key personnel, unki experience aur roles.

questions.explanation: Management Team section mein business ke key personnel, unki qualifications, experience aur specific roles ko highlight kiya jata hai, jo investors ke liye important hota hai.

questions.question: Environmental regulations ka business par kya asar hota hai?

options.B: Ye business operations ko eco-friendly banane mein madad karte hain aur compliance ensure karte hain.
options.C: Ye sirf international businesses ke liye hain.
options.D: Ye business growth ko rok dete hain.

questions.explanation: Environmental regulations business ko sustainable practices apnane aur pollution control karne mein madad karte hain, jisse long-term environmental aur social benefits milte hain.

questions.question: Copyright kis cheez ko protect karta hai?

options.B: Ek brand name.
options.C: Literary, dramatic, musical aur artistic works.

questions.explanation: Copyright literary, dramatic, musical aur artistic works ko protect karta hai, jisse unke creators ko unke kaam par exclusive rights milte hain.

questions.question: A Memorandum of Association (MoA) kis company ke liye zaroori hai?

options.B: Partnership firm.

questions.explanation: Memorandum of Association (MoA) ek company ka sabse important document hota hai jo uske objects, powers aur scope ko define karta hai. Ye companies ke liye mandatory hai.

questions.question: Business plan mein SWOT analysis ka kya role hai?

options.A: Sirf competitors ki weaknesses dikhane ke liye.
options.B: Business ki internal strengths aur weaknesses, aur external opportunities aur threats ko identify karne ke liye.
options.C: Sirf marketing budget decide karne ke liye.
options.D: Company ke employees ki performance evaluate karne ke liye.

questions.explanation: SWOT analysis business ko apni internal aur external situation ko samajhne mein madad karta hai, jisse strategic planning mein clarity aati hai.

questions.question: Compliance with 'Labour Laws' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Employees ke rights, working conditions aur wages se related legal rules ko follow karna.
options.C: Sirf government offices mein paperwork submit karna.

questions.explanation: Labour Laws ka compliance matlab hai employees ke rights, working conditions, minimum wages, safety standards, aadi se related sabhi legal niyam kanoon ka palan karna.

questions.question: Marketing Mix ke '4 Ps' kya hain?

options.B: Product, Price, Place, Promotion

questions.explanation: Marketing Mix ke 4 Ps hain Product, Price, Place (distribution), aur Promotion. Ye marketing strategy ke core components hain.

questions.question: Branding kyun zaroori hai ek naye business ke liye?

options.A: Sirf product ko attractive banane ke liye.
options.B: Customer ke mind mein unique identity aur recognition create karne ke liye.
options.D: Product ki cost kam karne ke liye.

questions.explanation: Branding customers ke mind mein aapke business aur product ki ek unique pehchan banati hai, jisse trust aur loyalty develop hoti hai.

questions.question: Digital Marketing ka ek example kya hai?

options.B: Radio jingles.

questions.explanation: Digital Marketing mein online channels ka use kiya jata hai jaise social media, search engines, email, websites, aadi.

questions.question: SEO ka full form kya hai?

options.B: Search Engine Optimization

questions.explanation: SEO ka full form Search Engine Optimization hai, jiska uddeshya website ko search engine results mein higher rank karwana hai.

questions.question: Customer Acquisition Cost (CAC) kya hai?

options.A: Ek customer ko product bechne ka kharcha.
options.B: Naye customer ko apne business tak lane ka total kharcha.

questions.explanation: CAC woh total cost hai jo ek business ko ek naye customer ko acquire karne mein lagti hai, jisme marketing aur sales expenses shamil hote hain.

questions.question: Content Marketing mein kya shamil hota hai?

options.B: Relevant aur valuable content create karke audience ko attract karna.
options.C: Sirf product ki features list karna.

questions.explanation: Content Marketing mein informative aur engaging content (blogs, videos, articles) banaya jata hai jisse audience ko attract aur retain kiya ja sake.

questions.question: Pricing strategy mein 'Cost-plus pricing' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Product ki cost mein ek fixed percentage profit margin add karna.
options.C: Customer ki willingness to pay ke hisab se price set karna.

questions.explanation: Cost-plus pricing mein product ki total cost calculate ki jati hai aur usme ek pre-determined profit margin add karke selling price set kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Social Media Marketing (SMM) ka kya fayda hai?

options.A: Sirf bade businesses ke liye faydemand hai.
options.B: Targeted audience tak pahunchne aur customer engagement badhane mein madad karta hai.
options.D: Sirf product reviews collect karne ke liye.

questions.explanation: SMM se businesses apni target audience tak pahunch sakte hain, brand awareness badha sakte hain aur customers ke saath directly engage kar sakte hain.

questions.question: Distribution Channel ka kya role hai?

options.B: Product ko manufacturer se customer tak pahunchana.

questions.explanation: Distribution channel woh rasta hai jiske through product ya service manufacturer se final customer tak pahunchta hai.

questions.question: Public Relations (PR) ka mukhya uddeshya kya hai?

options.B: Public aur media ke saath positive image maintain karna.

questions.explanation: PR ka uddeshya public aur media ke saath achhe relations maintain karke business ki positive image aur reputation banana hai.

questions.question: Upselling kya hota hai?

options.A: Customer ko ek sasta product bechna.
options.B: Customer ko ek higher-priced ya upgraded version ka product bechna.
options.C: Customer ko ek unrelated product bechna.

questions.explanation: Upselling mein customer ko ek behtar ya upgraded version ka product offer kiya jata hai jo uski current purchase se zyada value provide kare.

questions.question: Customer Lifetime Value (CLV) kya represent karta hai?

options.A: Ek customer ne kitni baar product kharida hai.
options.B: Ek customer se expected total revenue jo woh business ke saath apne relationship ke dauran generate karega.
options.C: Ek customer ko acquire karne ki cost.

questions.explanation: CLV woh total value hai jo ek customer ek business ke liye generate karega apni poori customer journey mein.

questions.question: Email Marketing ka kya fayda hai?

options.A: Ye sirf spam emails send karta hai.
options.B: Personalized communication aur direct customer engagement.

questions.explanation: Email marketing se businesses apne customers ke saath direct aur personalized communication kar sakte hain, offers aur updates share kar sakte hain.

questions.question: Marketing Funnel kya describe karta hai?

options.B: Customer ki journey awareness se purchase tak.

questions.explanation: Marketing Funnel customer ki journey ko describe karta hai, awareness se lekar interest, consideration, aur finally purchase tak.

questions.question: Market Penetration strategy ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Existing products ko existing market mein zyada bechna.

questions.explanation: Market Penetration strategy mein existing market mein existing products ki sales ko badhane par focus kiya jata hai, jaise price reduction ya increased promotion.

questions.question: Seed Capital kya hota hai?

options.B: Initial funding jo business shuru karne ke liye chahiye hota hai.

questions.explanation: Seed Capital woh shuruati funding hoti hai jo ek naye business ko apne operations start karne aur initial expenses cover karne ke liye chahiye hoti hai.

questions.question: Bootstrapping ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Apne personal savings ya initial revenues se business ko fund karna.

questions.explanation: Bootstrapping mein ek entrepreneur apne personal resources aur business ke generate kiye gaye revenues ka use karke business ko fund karta hai, external funding ke bina.

questions.question: Profit and Loss Statement (P&L) kya show karta hai?

options.A: Company ki financial position ek specific point of time par.
options.B: Company ki income aur expenses ek specific period ke liye.

questions.explanation: Profit and Loss Statement (Income Statement) ek specific accounting period mein company ki income aur expenses ko dikhata hai, jisse net profit ya loss calculate hota hai.

questions.question: Balance Sheet kya provide karti hai?

options.A: Ek specific period mein company ka profit ya loss.
options.B: Company ki assets, liabilities aur owner's equity ek specific date par.
options.D: Company ke employees ki salary details.

questions.explanation: Balance Sheet ek specific date par company ki financial position ka snapshot deti hai, jisme assets, liabilities aur equity shamil hote hain.

questions.question: Cash Flow Statement ka kya importance hai?

options.B: Company mein kitna cash aa raha hai aur kitna ja raha hai, ye track karna.
options.C: Company ki assets ki value batana.
options.D: Company ke debts ki jaankari dena.

questions.explanation: Cash Flow Statement business ke andar aur bahar cash ke movement ko track karta hai, jo business ki liquidity ke liye crucial hai.

questions.question: Working Capital kya hota hai?

options.B: Current assets minus current liabilities, jo daily operations ke liye chahiye.

questions.explanation: Working Capital woh capital hai jo business ke day-to-day operations ko fund karne ke liye chahiye hota hai, aur ye current assets minus current liabilities ke barabar hota hai.

questions.question: Angel Investor kaun hota hai?

options.A: Ek bank jo business loans deta hai.
options.B: Ek individual jo naye businesses mein apna personal capital invest karta hai.
options.C: Ek government agency jo grants deti hai.
options.D: Ek company jo venture capital provide karti hai.

questions.explanation: Angel investor ek high net worth individual hota hai jo naye businesses (startups) mein apna personal capital invest karta hai, aam taur par equity ke badle.

questions.question: Venture Capital (VC) funding kya hai?

options.B: High-growth potential startups mein equity investment.

questions.explanation: Venture Capital funds high-growth potential startups aur early-stage companies mein equity ke badle investment karte hain, jisse unhe scale karne mein madad milti hai.

questions.question: Break-Even Point kya hai?

options.A: Woh point jahan business maximum profit kamata hai.
options.B: Woh point jahan total revenue total costs ke barabar hota hai (no profit, no loss).
options.C: Woh point jahan business losses mein chala jata hai.
options.D: Woh point jahan business band ho jata hai.

questions.explanation: Break-Even Point woh level of sales hai jahan business na profit kamata hai aur na hi loss uthata hai, matlab total revenue total cost ke barabar hoti hai.

questions.question: Fixed Costs ka ek example kya hai?

options.B: Sales commission.
options.D: Electricity bill (production ke hisab se change hota hai).

questions.explanation: Fixed costs woh expenses hote hain jo production level ya sales volume ke saath change nahi hote, jaise factory rent, insurance premiums.

questions.question: Variable Costs ka ek example kya hai?

options.B: Employees ki fixed salary.

questions.explanation: Variable costs woh expenses hote hain jo production level ya sales volume ke saath directly vary karte hain, jaise raw materials, direct labor.

questions.question: Return on Investment (ROI) kya measure karta hai?

options.B: Investment par kitna return generate hua hai.

questions.explanation: ROI ek performance measure hai jo investment ki efficiency ya profitability ko evaluate karta hai, matlab investment par kitna return mila.

questions.question: Crowdfunding kya hai?

options.B: Large number of people se small amounts of money raise karna, typically online.
options.D: Personal savings se business fund karna.

questions.explanation: Crowdfunding mein ek bade group of individuals se online platforms ke through small amounts of money raise kiya jata hai, ek project ya business ke liye.

questions.question: Invoice kya hota hai?

options.A: Ek document jo supplier ko payment karta hai.
options.B: Ek bill jo customer ko goods ya services provide karne ke baad diya jata hai.
options.C: Ek document jo company ki financial health batata hai.
options.D: Ek document jo employees ki attendance track karta hai.

questions.explanation: Invoice ek commercial document hota hai jo seller dwara buyer ko issue kiya jata hai, jisme goods ya services ki list aur unki costs shamil hoti hain.

questions.question: Petty Cash kya hai?

options.A: Bade transactions ke liye use hone wala cash.
options.B: Small, day-to-day expenses ke liye rakha gaya thoda cash.
options.D: Bank account mein rakha gaya sara cash.

questions.explanation: Petty cash woh chhota amount of cash hota hai jo company mein rakha jata hai, jisse small, incidental expenses (jaise office supplies, courier charges) ko pay kiya ja sake.

questions.question: Budgeting ka mukhya uddeshya kya hai?

options.B: Financial resources ko plan aur control karna.

questions.explanation: Budgeting mein future financial activities ko plan kiya jata hai, jisse income aur expenses ko effectively manage aur control kiya ja sake.

questions.question: Debt Financing ka ek example kya hai?

options.B: Bank loan lena.

questions.explanation: Debt financing mein funds loan ke roop mein liye jate hain, jinhe interest ke saath wapas karna hota hai, jaise bank loans, bonds.

questions.question: Equity Financing ka ek example kya hai?

options.B: Bonds issue karna.

questions.explanation: Equity financing mein funds company ke ownership (shares) ko sell karke raise kiye jate hain, jisse investors company mein shareholdings lete hain.

questions.question: Profit Margin kya batata hai?

options.B: Har sales rupee par kitna profit kamaya gaya hai.

questions.explanation: Profit Margin company ki profitability ko measure karta hai, batata hai ki har sales rupee par kitna profit generate hua hai.

questions.question: Receipt kya hai?

options.A: Ek document jo payment ki request karta hai.
options.B: Ek document jo proof deta hai ki payment receive ho gaya hai.
options.C: Ek document jo future expenses plan karta hai.
options.D: Ek document jo products ki list deta hai.

questions.explanation: Receipt ek document hota hai jo buyer ko diya jata hai, is baat ka proof ki usne payment kar diya hai.

questions.question: Supply Chain Management (SCM) ka mukhya uddeshya kya hai?

options.B: Raw materials se lekar final product tak saare processes ko optimize karna.

questions.explanation: SCM ka uddeshya raw materials ki sourcing se lekar final product ki delivery tak saare processes ko efficiently manage karna aur optimize karna hai.

questions.question: Human Resources (HR) ka kya role hai business mein?

options.B: Employees ki hiring, training, management aur welfare.

questions.explanation: HR department employees se related saari activities ko handle karta hai, jaise recruitment, training, performance management, compensation aur employee relations.

questions.question: Team building kyun zaroori hai ek startup ke liye?

options.A: Sirf employees ko busy rakhne ke liye.
options.B: Collaboration badhane, skills ko combine karne aur goals achieve karne ke liye.
options.C: Sirf budget kam karne ke liye.
options.D: Competitors ko copy karne ke liye.

questions.explanation: Team building se employees ke beech collaboration, trust aur communication badhta hai, jisse woh collective goals ko behtar tareeke se achieve kar pate hain.

questions.question: Delegation of Authority ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Apne subordinates ko kuch tasks aur decision-making power dena.
options.D: Kisi ko bhi responsibility na dena.

questions.explanation: Delegation of Authority mein ek manager apne subordinates ko tasks aur unhe pura karne ke liye zaroori decision-making authority deta hai.

questions.question: Scaling a business ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Revenue aur operations ko significant level tak grow karna without proportional increase in cost.

questions.explanation: Scaling ek business ko grow karna hai jisme revenue badhta hai lekin costs proportionally nahi badhti, jisse profitability badhti hai.

questions.question: Mentorship ka entrepreneur ke liye kya fayda hai?

options.B: Guidance, advice aur experience share karna.
options.D: Competitors ke secrets janne ke liye.

questions.explanation: Mentorship mein ek experienced person (mentor) ek less experienced person (mentee) ko guidance, advice aur apna experience share karta hai.

questions.question: Risk Management ka kya role hai business mein?

options.B: Potential risks ko identify karna, assess karna aur unhe mitigate karna.

questions.explanation: Risk Management mein business ke potential risks ko pehchana jata hai, unka analysis kiya jata hai aur unhe kam karne ya handle karne ke liye strategies banai jati hain.

questions.question: Customer Feedback kyun important hai operations ke liye?

options.B: Product/service improve karne, customer satisfaction badhane aur future innovation ke liye.
options.C: Sirf employees ki performance judge karne ke liye.
options.D: Competitors se aage nikalne ke liye.

questions.explanation: Customer feedback se businesses ko apne products/services mein sudhar karne aur customer satisfaction badhane mein madad milti hai.

questions.question: Quality Control (QC) ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Products ya services ki quality standards ko maintain karna.

questions.explanation: Quality Control mein products ya services ki quality ko monitor aur maintain kiya jata hai, taaki woh set standards ko meet kare.

questions.question: Exit Strategy ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Business ko kabhi band na karna.
options.B: Ek plan jisme bataya jata hai ki ek entrepreneur future mein business se kaise bahar niklega (e.g., selling, IPO).
options.D: Market se product ko remove karna.

questions.explanation: Exit Strategy ek entrepreneur ka plan hota hai ki woh future mein apne business se kaise nikalega, jaise business ko bechna, IPO lana ya management ko handover karna.

questions.question: Performance Management ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Employees ki performance ko track karna, improve karna aur business goals se align karna.

questions.explanation: Performance Management employees ki performance ko set goals ke hisab se evaluate aur improve karne ka process hai, jisse business ke overall goals achieve ho sake.

questions.question: Business Process Automation (BPA) ka ek fayda kya hai?

options.B: Efficiency badhana, errors kam karna aur costs reduce karna.
options.D: Customers se direct interaction kam karna.

questions.explanation: BPA repetitive tasks ko automate karta hai, jisse operational efficiency badhti hai, human errors kam hote hain aur costs reduce hoti hain.

questions.question: Contingency Plan kya hai?

options.A: Sirf future ke profits plan karna.
options.B: Unexpected events ya crises ke liye ek backup plan.

questions.explanation: Contingency Plan ek backup plan hota hai jo unexpected events ya crises ke liye banaya jata hai, jisse business disruptions ko minimize kiya ja sake.

questions.question: Corporate Social Responsibility (CSR) ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Business ki samajik aur paryavaran zimmedari ko samajhna aur nibhana.

questions.explanation: CSR mein business apni operations ke social aur environmental impacts ke liye zimmedari leta hai, aur samaj ke liye positive contribution karta hai.

questions.question: Innovation ka continuous process business growth ke liye kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Ye sirf naye products banane ke liye hai.
options.B: Market mein relevant rehne, competition se aage rehne aur customer needs ko fulfill karne ke liye.
options.D: Ye business ko unstable banata hai.

questions.explanation: Continuous innovation business ko market mein relevant rakhta hai, competitors se aage rehne mein madad karta hai aur badalti hui customer needs ko pura karta hai, jisse long-term growth hoti hai.
